posting.sourceTitle: Plumbers & Steamfitters LU #22 JAC of Western NY
posting.jobTitle: Heating, Ventilation, & Air Conditioning Mechanic Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22
posting.locationSummary: Western New York; openings are split across the Finger Lakes and Western regions
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at the Local Union #22 office on the third Tuesday of each month during the recruitment period, then return them by mail or in person.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. on the third Tuesday of each month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties; in Genesee County, the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, and Alexander; in Orleans County, the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, and Shelby; or in Allegany County, the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, and Wirt.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid NYS driver’s license to operate company vehicles and reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test, at the sponsor’s expense, after selection and before enrollment in the apprenticeship program.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
Must provide a signed statement from the applicant’s personal physician stating that the applicant can physically perform the duties of a Heating, Ventilation, & Air Conditioning Mechanic.
Must have a valid NYS driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.

Must reside in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties; in Genesee County, the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, and Alexander; in Orleans County, the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, and Shelby; or in Allegany County, the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, and Wirt.
Must pass a drug test, at the sponsor’s expense, after selection and prior to enrollment in the apprenticeship program.
Must take and pass Work Keys Applied Mathematics, Workplace Documents, and Graphic Literacy Assessment tests with a minimum score of four out of seven in each category to be selected for interview.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, meet county residency rules, have a valid NYS driver’s license and reliable transportation, pass a drug test, and score at least 4 on required Work Keys tests.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22 for more information.
